function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request yet. I found the canonical project `school_helper_kit` (likely what you meant by “school routine kit”), but I could not find any canonical project for “attic rainwater rig.” Also, “delete the earliest project” is ambiguous because multiple projects share the earliest date prefix (`2026_03_26_*`). Please specify which exact project folder to compare against and which exact project to delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, treated inbox as request not truth, used canonical project READMEs, and avoided destructive mutation when evidence did not uniquely support deletion.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the requested comparator project is not present in canonical `40_projects/*/README.MD` evidence, and deletion target is non-unique under deletion workflow rules requiring exact supported targets.
